context: Tests whether the debugging-instruments skill corrects common stale or overstated memory, hang, and Thread Sanitizer guidance.

checklist.name: Leaks scope
checklist.description: Explains that Leaks detects leaked allocations or isolated cycles but does not prove every still-reachable retain cycle.

checklist.name: Memory graph workflow
checklist.description: Recommends Memory Graph Debugger and Allocations generation marks for iOS retain-cycle or memory-growth triage.

checklist.name: memgraph CLI workflow
checklist.description: Uses exported .memgraph files with leaks for CLI memory-graph inspection instead of presenting --atExit as the default iOS app workflow.

checklist.name: Hang threshold nuance
checklist.description: States that a few hundred milliseconds can feel unresponsive and that Apple tools typically report main-run-loop busy periods over 250 ms, without labeling every 250 ms pause severe.

checklist.name: TSan platform limit
checklist.description: States that Thread Sanitizer for iOS-family apps runs in Simulator, while Apple documents device support only for 64-bit macOS apps.

checklist.name: MetricKit boundary
checklist.description: Does not expand into MetricKit payload handling beyond a concise handoff, if MetricKit is mentioned at all.
